scripts.build: npm run build:site && npm run build:blog:site && npm run build:wiki:site && node scripts/add-embedded-routes.mjs
scripts.build:aurora: SITE_VARIANT=aurora astro build && node scripts/clean-aurora-build.mjs && echo aurora.luminusos.org > aurora/dist/CNAME
scripts.build:blog:site: SITE_BASE=/blog SITE_URL=https://luminusos.org astro build --root blog && rm -rf dist/blog && mkdir -p dist/blog && cp -R blog/dist/. dist/blog/
scripts.build:wiki:site: SITE_BASE=/wiki SITE_URL=https://luminusos.org astro build --root wiki && rm -rf dist/wiki && mkdir -p dist/wiki && cp -R wiki/dist/. dist/wiki/
scripts.deploy:aurora: npm run build:aurora && wrangler pages deploy aurora/dist --project-name luminusos-aurora
scripts.deploy:blog: npm run build:blog && wrangler pages deploy blog/dist --project-name luminusos-blog
scripts.deploy:wiki: npm run build:wiki && wrangler pages deploy wiki/dist --project-name luminusos-wiki
